category_sources: source_facts.description says qcachegrind visualizes data generated by Cachegrind and Calltree; official KDE app page classifies KCachegrind as Development.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is qcachegrind; official KDE source and documentation refer to KCachegrind/QCachegrind for profile visualization.
docs_sources: Official KDE documentation hosts the KCachegrind handbook; official KDE app page links handbook and source for the same project containing qcachegrind.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official KDE app/source pages identify the KCacheGrind repository at invent.kde.org/sdk/kcachegrind.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official KDE handbook describe profile data visualization, Callgrind/Cachegrind data, and KDE/Qt tooling.
